name: authproof
description: Cryptographically signed delegation receipts for AI agents. Define exactly what an AI can and can't do — signed, verifiable, tamper-proof.

scripts.test: node --experimental-global-webcrypto --experimental-vm-modules tests/authproof.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/action-log.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/rfc3161.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/scope-schema.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/revocation.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/handshake.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/canonicalizer.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/tee-attestation.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/capability-manifest.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/data-flow-receipt.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/batch-receipt.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/pre-execution-verifier.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/model-state-attestation.test.js && node --experimental-global-webcrypto tests/delegation-chain.test.js

author: AuthProof
